_generated: Auto-generated by tools/generate_catalog.py — do not edit manually

tools.name: get_object_metadata
tools.description: Inspect HDF5 object: returns shape, dtype, chunks, compression, attributes, storage size for datasets; member list for groups.
tools.detailed_description: Use before visualization or optimization to understand object structure. Works on datasets, groups, committed datatypes.
use_cases: Checking current chunk configuration before rechunking

tools.name: rechunk_dataset
tools.description: Change chunk layout/size to optimize I/O. Supports larger|smaller|half|double|exact dims|contiguous. Creates new file via h5repack.
tools.detailed_description: Call get_object_metadata() first to check current chunks. Adjustments: chunk_adjustment='larger'|'smaller'|'half'|'double', chunk_dims='10x20x30', or make_contiguous=True.
use_cases: Optimizing chunk size for access patterns
Converting between chunked and contiguous layouts
Aligning chunks with data access patterns

tools.name: apply_filter_dataset
tools.description: Add/change/remove compression filters on HDF5 dataset. Shrink file size or decompress. Creates new file via h5repack.
tools.detailed_description: Filters: gzip (level 1-9), szip (NASA), shuffle (byte reorder), fletcher32 (checksum), nbit (bit packing), scaleoffset (lossy), none (decompress).
use_cases: Compressing datasets to reduce file size
Applying shuffle filter to improve compression

tools.name: visualize
tools.description: Generate PNG plot of HDF5 dataset. Auto-selects type: line|scatter|hist|pcolormesh|imshow|contour. Supports HDF5-level slicing for large data.
tools.detailed_description: 1D→line/hist, 2D→pcolormesh/imshow/contour. Use hdf5_slices for memory-efficient subsetting. Call get_object_metadata() first to check shape.

tools.name: read_semantic_metadata
tools.description: Read SMD text description of one HDF5 object. Returns what the object represents/means.
tools.detailed_description: Returns SMD content if exists, error/info if not found. Single object only (not recursive).
use_cases: Checking if SMD exists for an object

tools.name: write_semantic_metadata
tools.description: Write/update SMD text description for one HDF5 object. Document, annotate, or label datasets/groups.
tools.detailed_description: Prefixes with "BEST GUESS: " by default (disable for verified info). Single object only.

tools.name: collect_objects_for_smd
tools.description: Scan file for objects missing SMD. Returns batch with structural metadata for auto-generating descriptions.
tools.detailed_description: Iterative workflow: call this → generate SMD → write_smd_batch() → repeat until empty batch.  This enables an iterative workflow: 1. Agent calls this function to get a batch of objects 2. Agent generates SMD for each object based on metadata 3. Agent calls write_smd_batch() to save the SMD 4. Agent repeats until this function returns an empty batch

tools.name: write_smd_batch
tools.description: Write SMD for multiple objects in one transaction. Pair with collect_objects_for_smd() for bulk annotation.
tools.detailed_description: Continues on individual failures, returns per-object success/failure details.
use_cases: Writing SMD for multiple objects at once

tools.name: vectorize_semantic_metadata
tools.description: Convert SMD text to vector embeddings stored in HDF5 file. Prerequisite for query_semantic_metadata() search.
tools.detailed_description: Embeds SMD via sentence-transformers, stores L2-normalized vectors in /ahdf5-vsmd group. Batch processing for memory efficiency.

tools.name: query_semantic_metadata
tools.description: Natural language search over vectorized SMD. Find datasets by meaning (e.g. "ocean temperature") without knowing paths.
tools.detailed_description: Returns top-k most similar objects. Requires vectorize_semantic_metadata() first. Supports path prefix filter and min score threshold.
use_cases: Finding datasets by natural language query
Discovering relevant data without knowing paths
